title: Review for Performance
description: Spot performance problems in a change before they ship.
content:
Review this code for performance problems:

```
{{code}}
```

Look for: N+1 queries, unnecessary allocations in hot paths, accidental O(n^2), blocking I/O on critical paths, missing pagination/limits, and repeated work that could be cached. For each, estimate the impact and whether it matters at this code's expected scale. Don't micro-optimize cold paths.
